name: The Weak Do Not Have the Right to Choose How They Die!!!
subtypes: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
effect_text: [Main] / [Counter] Rest up to 1 of your opponent's Leader or Character cards. Then, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's rested Characters with a cost of 6 or less. [Trigger] Set up to 5 of your DON!! cards as active.
